deployment_steps: Build the React application using the appropriate build tool (e.g., npm run build)
Run unit and integration tests to ensure code quality and functionality
Deploy the built static files to the production web server or CDN
Verify that the API endpoints /api/phrases/motivational and /api/phrases/satirical are accessible and returning expected data
Perform smoke tests on the production environment to confirm the UI loads and displays phrases correctly
Monitor application logs and performance metrics for any anomalies post-deployment
health_checks: Verify UI renders both motivational and satirical phrases without errors
Confirm no loading or error messages are shown on the main component after data fetch
result.rollback_plan: If deployment causes errors or degraded user experience, revert to the previous stable build by redeploying the last known good build artifacts and verify the application functionality before resuming normal operations.
